title: Bootstrap Manifest
description: Inventory of demo/test-environment objects the bootstrap/ scripts create (databases, schemas, source and target tables). Same shape as cleanup_manifest.json by design, but a deliberately separate file: bootstrap objects are environment scaffolding created once and rarely torn down, while cleanup_manifest.json covers per-run pipeline artifacts. Never conflate the two files or Clean could drop the demo environment.

script.description: Path to the bootstrap script that creates this object.

command.description: Fully resolved reset command (DROP/TRUNCATE) for this object.
